vw_account_balance.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_account_balance AS
        SELECT
            b.taxpayer_id,
            t.taxpayer_name,
            t.accounting_standard,
            b.period_year,
            b.period_month,
            b.account_code,
            a.account_name,
            a.level,
            a.category,
            a.balance_direction,
            a.is_gaap,
            a.is_small,
            b.revision_no,
            b.opening_balance,
            b.debit_amount,
            b.credit_amount,
            b.closing_balance,
            b.source_unit
        FROM account_balance b
        JOIN taxpayer_info t ON b.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
        JOIN account_master a ON b.account_code = a.account_code
        WHERE (
            (t.accounting_standard = '企业会计准则' AND a.is_gaap = 1)
            OR (t.accounting_standard = '小企业会计准则' AND a.is_small = 1)
            OR (a.is_gaap = 1 AND a.is_small = 1)
            OR t.accounting_standard IS NULL
        )

GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, t.accounting_standard,
         i.period_year, i.period_month, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id,

    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'DEVELOPMENT_EXPENDITURE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS development_expenditure_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'DEVELOPMENT_EXPENDITURE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS development_expenditure_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_DEFERRED_EXPENSES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS long_term_deferred_expenses_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_DEFERRED_EXPENSES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS long_term_deferred_expenses_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_NON_CURRENT_ASSETS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS other_non_current_assets_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_NON_CURRENT_ASSETS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS other_non_current_assets_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NON_CURRENT_ASSETS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS non_current_assets_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NON_CURRENT_ASSETS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS non_current_assets_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ASSETS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS assets_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ASSETS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS assets_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SHORT_TERM_LOANS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS short_term_loans_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SHORT_TERM_LOANS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS short_term_loans_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NOTES_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS notes_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NOTES_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS notes_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS accounts_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ACCOUNTS_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS accounts_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ADVANCES_FROM_CUSTOMERS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS advances_from_customers_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ADVANCES_FROM_CUSTOMERS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS advances_from_customers_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'EMPLOYEE_BENEFITS_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS employee_benefits_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'EMPLOYEE_BENEFITS_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS employee_benefits_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'TAXES_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS taxes_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'TAXES_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS taxes_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'INTEREST_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS interest_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'INTEREST_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS interest_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'PROFIT_PAYABLE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS profit_payable_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'PROFIT_PAYABLE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS profit_payable_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_PAYABLES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS other_payables_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_PAYABLES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS other_payables_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS other_current_liabilities_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS other_current_liabilities_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS current_liabilities_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS current_liabilities_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_LOANS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS long_term_loans_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_LOANS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS long_term_loans_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_PAYABLES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS long_term_payables_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LONG_TERM_PAYABLES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS long_term_payables_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'DEFERRED_INCOME' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS deferred_income_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'DEFERRED_INCOME' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS deferred_income_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_NON_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS other_non_current_liabilities_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'OTHER_NON_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS other_non_current_liabilities_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NON_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS non_current_liabilities_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'NON_CURRENT_LIABILITIES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS non_current_liabilities_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LIABILITIES' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS liabilities_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LIABILITIES' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS liabilities_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SHARE_CAPITAL' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS share_capital_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SHARE_CAPITAL' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS share_capital_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'CAPITAL_RESERVE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS capital_reserve_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'CAPITAL_RESERVE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS capital_reserve_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SURPLUS_RESERVE' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS surplus_reserve_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'SURPLUS_RESERVE' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS surplus_reserve_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'RETAINED_EARNINGS' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS retained_earnings_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'RETAINED_EARNINGS' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS retained_earnings_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'EQUITY' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS equity_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'EQUITY' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS equity_end,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LIABILITIES_AND_EQUITY' THEN i.beginning_balance END) AS liabilities_and_equity_begin,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'LIABILITIES_AND_EQUITY' THEN i.ending_balance END) AS liabilities_and_equity_end
FROM fs_balance_sheet_item i
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON i.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
WHERE i.gaap_type = 'ASSE'
GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, t.accounting_standard,
         i.period_year, i.period_month, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id,
         i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence

vw_cash_flow_eas.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_cash_flow_eas AS
SELECT
    i.taxpayer_id,
    t.taxpayer_name,
    i.period_year,
    i.period_month,
    tr.time_range,
    t.taxpayer_type,
    t.accounting_standard,
    i.revision_no,
    i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_inflow_sales' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_inflow_sales,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_inflow_tax_refund' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_inflow_tax_refund,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_inflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_inflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_inflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_inflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_outflow_purchase' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_outflow_purchase,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_outflow_labor' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_outflow_labor,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_outflow_tax' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_outflow_tax,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_outflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_outflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_outflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_outflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_net_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_net_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_sale_investment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_sale_investment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_returns' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_returns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_disposal_assets' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_disposal_assets,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_disposal_subsidiary' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_disposal_subsidiary,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_inflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_inflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_outflow_purchase_assets' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_outflow_purchase_assets,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_outflow_purchase_investment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_outflow_purchase_investment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_outflow_acquire_subsidiary' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_outflow_acquire_subsidiary,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_outflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_outflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_outflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_outflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_net_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_net_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_inflow_capital' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_inflow_capital,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_inflow_borrowing' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_inflow_borrowing,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_inflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_inflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_inflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_inflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_outflow_debt_repayment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_outflow_debt_repayment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_outflow_dividend_interest' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_outflow_dividend_interest,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_outflow_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_outflow_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_outflow_subtotal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_outflow_subtotal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_net_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_net_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'fx_impact' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS fx_impact,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'net_increase_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS net_increase_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'beginning_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS beginning_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ending_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS ending_cash
FROM fs_cash_flow_item i
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON i.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT '本期' AS time_range UNION ALL SELECT '本年累计') tr
WHERE i.gaap_type = 'CAS'
  AND t.accounting_standard = '企业会计准则'
GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, i.period_year, i.period_month,
         tr.time_range, t.taxpayer_type, t.accounting_standard, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence

CREATE VIEW vw_cash_flow_sas AS
SELECT
    i.taxpayer_id,
    t.taxpayer_name,
    i.period_year,
    i.period_month,
    tr.time_range,
    t.taxpayer_type,
    t.accounting_standard,

    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_receipts_sales' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_receipts_sales,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_receipts_other' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_receipts_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_payments_purchase' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_payments_purchase,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_payments_staff' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_payments_staff,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_payments_tax' THEN

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_payments_other,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_net_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_net_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_receipts_disposal_investment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_receipts_disposal_investment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_receipts_returns' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_receipts_returns,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_receipts_disposal_assets' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_receipts_disposal_assets,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_payments_purchase_investment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_payments_purchase_investment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_payments_purchase_assets' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_payments_purchase_assets,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investing_net_cash' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investing_net_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_receipts_borrowing' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_receipts_borrowing,

        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_receipts_capital,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_payments_debt_principal' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_payments_debt_principal,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financing_payments_debt_interest' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financing_payments_debt_interest,

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS net_increase_cash,

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS beginning_cash,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'ending_cash' THEN

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS ending_cash
FROM fs_cash_flow_item i
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON i.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT '本期' AS time_range UNION ALL SELECT '本年累计') tr
WHERE i.gaap_type = 'SAS'
  AND t.accounting_standard = '小企业会计准则'
GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, i.period_year, i.period_month,
         tr.time_range, t.taxpayer_type, t.accounting_standard, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence

vw_eit_annual_main.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_eit_annual_main AS
        SELECT
            f.filing_id, f.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, t.taxpayer_type,
            f.period_year, f.revision_no,
            f.submitted_at, f.etl_batch_id, f.source_doc_id, f.etl_confidence,
            m.revenue, m.cost, m.taxes_surcharges,
            m.selling_expenses, m.admin_expenses, m.rd_expenses, m.financial_expenses,
            m.other_gains, m.investment_income, m.net_exposure_hedge_gains,
            m.fair_value_change_gains, m.credit_impairment_loss, m.asset_impairment_loss,
            m.asset_disposal_gains, m.operating_profit,
            m.non_operating_income, m.non_operating_expenses, m.total_profit,
            m.less_foreign_income, m.add_tax_adjust_increase, m.less_tax_adjust_decrease,
            m.exempt_income_deduction_total, m.add_foreign_tax_offset,
            m.adjusted_taxable_income, m.less_income_exemption,
            m.less_losses_carried_forward, m.less_taxable_income_deduction,
            m.taxable_income, m.tax_rate, m.tax_payable,
            m.tax_credit_total, m.less_foreign_tax_credit, m.tax_due,
            m.add_foreign_tax_due, m.less_foreign_tax_credit_amount,
            m.actual_tax_payable, m.less_prepaid_tax, m.tax_payable_or_refund,
            m.hq_share, m.fiscal_central_share, m.hq_dept_share,
            m.less_ethnic_autonomous_relief, m.less_audit_adjustment,
            m.less_special_adjustment, m.final_tax_payable_or_refund
        FROM eit_annual_filing f
        JOIN eit_annual_main m ON f.filing_id = m.filing_id
        JOIN taxpayer_info t ON f.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id

vw_eit_quarter_main.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_eit_quarter_main AS
        SELECT
            f.filing_id, f.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, t.taxpayer_type,
            f.period_year, f.period_quarter, f.revision_no,
            f.submitted_at, f.etl_batch_id, f.source_doc_id, f.etl_confidence,
            m.employee_quarter_avg, m.asset_quarter_avg,
            m.restricted_or_prohibited_industry, m.small_micro_enterprise,
            m.revenue, m.cost, m.total_profit,
            m.add_specific_business_taxable_income, m.less_non_taxable_income,
            m.less_accelerated_depreciation, m.tax_free_income_deduction_total,
            m.income_exemption_total, m.less_losses_carried_forward,
            m.actual_profit, m.tax_rate, m.tax_payable,
            m.tax_credit_total, m.less_prepaid_tax_current_year,
            m.less_specific_business_prepaid, m.current_tax_payable_or_refund,
            m.hq_share_total, m.hq_share, m.fiscal_central_share,
            m.hq_business_dept_share, m.branch_share_ratio, m.branch_share_amount,
            m.ethnic_autonomous_relief_amount, m.final_tax_payable_or_refund
        FROM eit_quarter_filing f
        JOIN eit_quarter_main m ON f.filing_id = m.filing_id
        JOIN taxpayer_info t ON f.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id

vw_enterprise_profile.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_enterprise_profile AS

               NULL AS period_month, NULL AS metric_name, NULL AS metric_value WHERE 0

vw_financial_metrics.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_financial_metrics AS
SELECT
    fm.taxpayer_id,
    t.taxpayer_name,
    t.taxpayer_type,
    t.accounting_standard,
    fm.period_year,
    fm.period_month,
    CASE
        WHEN fm.period_month = 12 THEN 'annual'
        WHEN fm.period_month IN (3, 6, 9, 12) THEN 'quarterly'
        ELSE 'monthly'
    END AS period_type,
    fm.metric_category,
    fm.metric_code,
    fm.metric_name,
    fm.metric_value,
    fm.metric_unit,
    fm.evaluation_level,
    fm.calculated_at
FROM financial_metrics fm
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON fm.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id

        SELECT NULL AS taxpayer_id, NULL AS taxpayer_name, NULL AS period_year,
               NULL AS period_month, NULL AS statement_type, NULL AS item_name,
               NULL AS amount WHERE 0

vw_profit_eas.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_profit_eas AS
SELECT
    i.taxpayer_id,
    t.taxpayer_name,
    i.period_year,
    i.period_month,
    tr.time_range,
    '企业会计准则' AS accounting_standard_name,
    i.revision_no,
    i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_revenue' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_revenue,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_cost' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_cost,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'taxes_and_surcharges' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS taxes_and_surcharges,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'selling_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS selling_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'administrative_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS administrative_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'rd_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS rd_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'financial_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS financial_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'interest_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS interest_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'interest_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS interest_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'other_gains' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS other_gains,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investment_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investment_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'investment_income_associates' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS investment_income_associates,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'amortized_cost_termination_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS amortized_cost_termination_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'net_exposure_hedge_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS net_exposure_hedge_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'fair_value_change_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS fair_value_change_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'credit_impairment_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS credit_impairment_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'asset_impairment_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS asset_impairment_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'asset_disposal_gains' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS asset_disposal_gains,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'non_operating_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS non_operating_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'non_operating_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS non_operating_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'total_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS total_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'income_tax_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS income_tax_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'net_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS net_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'continued_ops_net_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS continued_ops_net_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'discontinued_ops_net_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS discontinued_ops_net_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'other_comprehensive_income_net' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS other_comprehensive_income_net,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_not_reclassifiable' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_not_reclassifiable,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_reclassifiable' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_reclassifiable,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'comprehensive_income_total' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS comprehensive_income_total,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'eps_basic' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS eps_basic,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'eps_diluted' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS eps_diluted,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_remeasurement_pension' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_remeasurement_pension,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_equity_method_nonreclassifiable' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_equity_method_nonreclassifiable,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_equity_investment_fv_change' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_equity_investment_fv_change,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_credit_risk_change' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_credit_risk_change,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_equity_method_reclassifiable' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_equity_method_reclassifiable,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_debt_investment_fv_change' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_debt_investment_fv_change,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_reclassify_to_pnl' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_reclassify_to_pnl,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_debt_impairment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_debt_impairment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_cash_flow_hedge' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_cash_flow_hedge,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'oci_foreign_currency_translation' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS oci_foreign_currency_translation
FROM fs_income_statement_item i
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON i.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT '本期' AS time_range UNION ALL SELECT '本年累计') tr
WHERE i.gaap_type = 'CAS'
GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, i.period_year, i.period_month,
         tr.time_range, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence

CREATE VIEW vw_profit_sas AS

        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_revenue,

    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'selling_expense' THEN

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS research_expense,

    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'operating_profit' THEN

             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS operating_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'non_operating_income' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS non_operating_income,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'government_grant' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS government_grant,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'non_operating_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS non_operating_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'bad_debt_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS bad_debt_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'long_term_bond_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS long_term_bond_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'long_term_equity_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS long_term_equity_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'force_majeure_loss' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS force_majeure_loss,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'tax_late_payment' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS tax_late_payment,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'total_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS total_profit,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'income_tax_expense' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS income_tax_expense,
    MAX(CASE WHEN i.item_code = 'net_profit' THEN
        CASE WHEN tr.time_range = '本期' THEN i.current_amount
             ELSE i.cumulative_amount END END) AS net_profit
FROM fs_income_statement_item i
JOIN taxpayer_info t ON i.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
CROSS JOIN (SELECT '本期' AS time_range UNION ALL SELECT '本年累计') tr
WHERE i.gaap_type = 'SAS'
GROUP BY i.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name, i.period_year, i.period_month,
         tr.time_range, i.revision_no,
         i.submitted_at, i.etl_batch_id, i.source_doc_id, i.source_unit, i.etl_confidence

vw_vat_return_general.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_vat_return_general AS
        SELECT
            g.taxpayer_id, t.taxpayer_name,
            g.period_year, g.period_month, g.item_type, g.time_range,
            t.taxpayer_type, g.revision_no, g.submitted_at,
            g.etl_batch_id, g.source_doc_id, g.source_unit, g.etl_confidence,
            g.sales_taxable_rate, g.sales_goods, g.sales_services,
            g.sales_adjustment_check, g.sales_simple_method,
            g.sales_simple_adjust_check, g.sales_export_credit_refund,
            g.sales_tax_free, g.sales_tax_free_goods, g.sales_tax_free_services,
            g.output_tax, g.input_tax, g.last_period_credit, g.transfer_out,
            g.export_refund, g.tax_check_supplement, g.deductible_total,
            g.actual_deduct, g.tax_payable, g.end_credit, g.simple_tax,
            g.simple_tax_check_supplement, g.tax_reduction, g.total_tax_payable,
            g.unpaid_begin, g.export_receipt_tax, g.paid_current,
            g.prepaid_installment, g.prepaid_export_receipt, g.paid_last_period,
            g.paid_arrears, g.unpaid_end, g.arrears, g.supplement_refund,
            g.immediate_refund, g.unpaid_check_begin, g.paid_check_current,
            g.unpaid_check_end, g.city_maintenance_tax, g.education_surcharge,
            g.local_education_surcharge
        FROM vat_return_general g
        JOIN taxpayer_info t ON g.taxpayer_id = t.taxpayer_id
        WHERE t.taxpayer_type = '一般纳税人'

vw_vat_return_small.sql:
CREATE VIEW vw_vat_return_small AS

            s.etl_batch_id, s.source_doc_id, s.source_unit, s.etl_confidence,
            s.sales_3percent, s.sales_3percent_invoice_spec,
            s.sales_3percent_invoice_other, s.sales_5percent,
            s.sales_5percent_invoice_spec, s.sales_5percent_invoice_other,
            s.sales_used_assets, s.sales_used_assets_invoice_other,
            s.sales_tax_free, s.sales_tax_free_micro, s.sales_tax_free_threshold,
            s.sales_tax_free_other, s.sales_export_tax_free,
            s.sales_export_tax_free_invoice_other,
            s.tax_due_current, s.tax_due_reduction, s.tax_free_amount,
            s.tax_free_micro, s.tax_free_threshold, s.tax_due_total,
            s.tax_prepaid, s.tax_supplement_refund,
            s.city_maintenance_tax, s.education_surcharge,
            s.local_education_surcharge
